name: 3-Day Tour: Rabat → Chefchaouen → Fes → Casablanca

seo.title: 3-Day Rabat → Chefchaouen → Fes → Casablanca Tour | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 3-day tour from Rabat: Chefchaouen (Blue City), medieval Fes with official guide, back to Casablanca. Transport and accommodation included.

intro: This 3-day tour connects Rabat to Casablanca via Chefchaouen and Fes. In two main stops, you'll discover the magic of the Blue City and the medieval richness of Fes with an official guide. Ideal for a long weekend or at the start/end of your stay.
